ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF(NOT(ISBLANK( IP_LastPassedToTempest__c ))&&( RecordType.Name == "LTD"||RecordType.Name == "Umbrella") && NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name, "Administrator")), IF(ISCHANGED( IP_BusinessAddressLine1__c )|| ISCHANGED( IP_BusinessAddressPostcode__c )|| ISCHANGED( IP_CompanyName__c )|| ISCHANGED( IP_CompanyRegNo__c )|| ISCHANGED( IP_PayrollID__c)|| ISCHANGED( IP_VATNumber__c )|| ISCHANGED( IP_BusinessAddressCounty__c ) || ISCHANGED( IP_NewStarterTaxStatus__c) || ISCHANGED( IP_BusinessAddressLine2__c) || ISCHANGED( IP_PaymentType__c) ,True,False) ,False)
